model.name: vm_c4_01
model.metadata: CREATE VIEW v_c4_01 AS SELECT left_id, right_id FROM bansos_db.keluarga_rel a JOIN bansos_db.keluarga_rel b ON a.leftid = b.right_id;

model.name: vm_c4_02
model.metadata: CREATE VIEW v_c4_02 AS SELECT left_id, right_id FROM bansos_db.keluarga_rel a JOIN bansos_db.keluarga_rel b ON a.lef_id = b.right_id;

model.name: vm_c4_03
model.metadata: CREATE VIEW v_c4_03 AS SELECT left_id, right_id FROM bansos_db.keluarga_rel a JOIN bansos_db.keluarga_rel b ON a.left_id = b.rightid;

model.name: vm_c4_04
model.metadata: CREATE VIEW v_c4_04 AS SELECT left_id, right_id FROM bansos_db.keluarga_rel a JOIN bansos_db.keluarga_rel b ON a.left_id = b.rigth_id;

model.name: vm_c4_prd
model.metadata: CREATE VIEW v_c4_prd_wilayah AS SELECT k.no_kk, k.wilayah_id, w.provinsi FROM bansos_db.master_keluarga k JOIN bansos_db.master_wilayah w ON k.wilayah_id = w.wilayah_ids;

model.name: vm_c4_ok
model.metadata: CREATE VIEW v_c4_ok AS SELECT a.left_id, a.right_id FROM bansos_db.keluarga_rel a JOIN bansos_db.keluarga_rel b ON a.left_id = b.right_id;
